name: PieChart
description: Composed pie chart with fixed DLS pie geometry, optional value labels, optional segment borders, and side or bottom legend placement.

props.name: stroke
props.description: Show white borders between pie segments.

props.name: labels
props.description: Show the value callout label layer over the pie.

props.name: labelCategories
props.description: Show category labels inside the pie label layer.

props.name: labelStroke
props.description: Show colored leader strokes for value callouts.

props.name: labelItems
props.description: Label items rendered in their fixed Figma positions.

props.name: legendBottom
props.description: Place the legend under the chart instead of beside it.

states.rationale: Passive data-display composition. The only state-like attributes control label visibility and side vs bottom legend placement.

useWhen: Rendering the fixed DLS pie chart composition from Figma
Showing passive pie-chart examples with value callouts and a side or bottom legend
Composing Pie, PieChartLabels, and LegendGroup into a single chart unit
doNotUseFor: Dynamic production analytics charts - use a charting library and DLS tokens
Pie value callouts alone - use PieChartLabels
knownDeviations: The Figma MCP output used temporary image asset URLs for segment and leader drawings. The code composes durable DLS SVG/CSS primitives instead.
